project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
notes: Added services/open-data-service Go API with catalog, detail, rate-limited audited download, access request, and admin review endpoints. Citizen-web Open Data Portal shows category filters, dataset detail with sample data table, download button, and restricted-dataset request form. Shared TypeScript contracts, smoke script, CI Docker matrix entry, README, api.md docs, and plan updates added. Datasets are approved and anonymized/aggregated before public exposure; downloads are rate-limited and audited.
